ustilaginaceae.d: n a fungus family of loose smuts

ustilaginales.d: n. parasitic fungi causing smuts; sometimes placed in class Tiliomycetes

ustilaginoidea.t: n. 拟黑粉霉属；绿核菌属

ustilaginoidea virens.t: [网络] 稻曲病菌；水稻稻曲病菌；稻绿核菌

ustilago.t: [医] 黑粉菌属, 黑穗病菌属
ustilago.d: n type genus of the Ustilaginaceae; genus comprising the loose smuts

ustilic acid.t: [化] 三羟基十六酸; 三羟基十六烷酸

ustilic acid a.t: [化] 二羟基十六酸; 二羟基十六烷酸

ustion.d: n. The act of burning, or the state of being burned.

ustr.t: abbr. United States trade representative 美国贸易代表; United States Trade Representative 美国贸易代表

usts.t: abbr. United States Travel Service 美国旅行社

ustulation.t: 煅, 焙干, 燃烧作用
ustulation.d:
n. The act of burning or searing.
n. The operation of expelling one substance from another
   by heat, as sulphur or arsenic from ores, in a muffle.
n. The roasting or drying of moist substances so as
   prepare them for pulverizing.
n. The burning of wine.
n. Lascivious passion; concupiscence.

usual.t: a. 平常的, 通常的
usual.d: a. occurring or encountered or experienced or observed frequently or in accordance with regular practice or procedure
usual.g: zk gk cet4 cet6 ky ielts

usualness.d: n. commonness by virtue of not being unusual

usucapion.t: n. 凭时效取得财产权

usucaption.t: [法] 取得时效, 凭时效取得
usucaption.d:
n. The acquisition of the title or right to property by
   the uninterrupted possession of it for a certain term prescribed by
   law; -- the same as prescription in common law.

usufruct.t:
n. 用益权, 使用权, 行使用益权
[经] 用益权
usufruct.d: n. a legal right to use and derive profit from property belonging to someone else provided that the property itself is not injured in any way

usufructuary.t:
n. 用益权使用者, 有用益权者
[法] 享有用益权的人, 有用益权的人; 使用权的, 受益权的, 有用益权的
usufructuary.d:
n. someone who holds property by usufruct
a. of or relating to the nature of a usufruct

usumbura.t: 乌松布拉(布隆迪首都布琼布拉)
usumbura.d: n the capital and largest city of Burundi

usur.t: [医] 溃蚀, 表面性溃疡

usurer.t:
n. 高利贷者
[经] 高利贷者
usurer.d: n. someone who lends money at excessive rates of interest

usurers.d: n. someone who lends money at excessive rates of interest

usurious.t:
a. 收取高利的, 高利贷的
[经] 取高利的, 高利贷的
usurious.d: s greatly exceeding bounds of reason or moderation

usuriously.t: adv. 放高利贷地; 取高利地, 高利贷地

usurp.t:
vt. 篡夺, 侵占, 夺取
vi. 篡夺, 侵占

usurpation.t:
n. 篡夺, 霸占, 夺取
[法] 篡夺, 强夺, 霸占
usurpation.d: n. wrongfully seizing and holding (an office or powers) by force (especially the seizure of a throne or supreme authority)

usurpations.t:
(usurpation 的复数) n. 篡夺, 霸占, 夺取
[法] 篡夺, 强夺, 霸占
usurpations.d:
plural of usurpation
n. wrongfully seizing and holding (an office or powers) by force (especially the seizure of a throne or supreme authority)

usurpative.t: a. 篡夺的,夺取的,侵占的

usurpatory.t: a. 篡夺的, 夺取的, 侵占的

usurped.t: v. 篡夺, 霸占( usurp的过去式和过去分词 ); 盗用; 篡夺, 篡权

usurper.t:
n. 篡夺者, 夺取者
[法] 篡位者, 篡夺权者
usurper.d: n. one who wrongfully or illegally seizes and holds the place of another

usurpers.t:
(usurper 的复数) n. 篡夺者, 夺取者
[法] 篡位者, 篡夺权者
usurpers.d:
plural of usurper
n. one who wrongfully or illegally seizes and holds the place of another

usurping.t: v. 篡夺, 霸占( usurp的现在分词 ); 盗用; 篡夺, 篡权
usurping.d: p. pr. & vb. n. of Usurp

usurpingly.t: adv. 篡夺地, 夺取地, 侵占地

usurps.t: v. 篡夺, 霸占( usurp的第三人称单数 ); 盗用; 篡夺, 篡权
usurps.d:
v seize and take control without authority and possibly with force; take as one's right or possession
v take the place of

usury.t:
n. 高利贷
[经] 高利贷, 高利
usury.d:
n. an exorbitant or unlawful rate of interest
n. the act of lending money at an exorbitant rate of interest

usus bellici.t: [法] 军事用途, 军事目标

usus loquendi.t: [拉]习惯说法, 文风, 语言习惯

usvi.t: abbr. United States Virgin Islands (St Croix, St John, St Thomas) 美国维京群岛（圣克鲁伊克斯，圣约翰，圣托马斯）

usw.t: abbr. und so weiter <德>等等; 以及其他等等

uswa.t: abbr. United Shoe Workers of America 美国制鞋工人联合会; United Steel Workers of America 美国联合钢铁工人

usx.t: 美国钢铁马拉松公司总部所在地：美国主要业务：炼油
